headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Caesars Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $32
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Barry Jonas   maintains Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $29 to $32.
